remarks: 20 Cherry Lane is a rare Georgian Colonial estate set on nearly 2.5 flat, manicured acres bordering 50 acres of protected conservation land and hiking trails. Offering over 7200 sqft, with an additional 2100+ sqft lower level, this home combines exceptional scale, modern updates, and long-term value. Designed for entertaining and everyday living, the renovated chef's kitchen features double marble islands, double ovens, dual dishwashers, navy subway tile, and a custom coffee/wine bar, flowing into the oversized Great Room with a massive stone fireplace, full bar, and direct access to the resort style pool area. The flexible layout includes 6 bedrooms, a luxurious primary suite with private balcony and oversized walk-in closets, double office/conference spaces, library, homework zone, first floor guest suite, and a fully self contained in-law/au pair suite with private entrance, kitchen, and living area. The renovated lower level offers a gym, infrared sauna, indoor hot tub, wine cellar, spa lounge, oversized playroom, and custom bunk room. Outdoors enjoy a restored pool and spa, sports courts, playground, gazebo, fire pits, and multiple entertaining areas. Major upgrades include a new 2024 roof, updated HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and a renovated 4 car garage with smart-tech doors. Move in ready with the option to be sold fully furnished, this exceptional estate offers incredible space, infrastructure, and upside in a premier school district.
